title: The Graduation
content:
Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao were graduating from college, and they were both excited and nervous about the future.

They had spent four years together, and now they were about to start the next chapter of their lives.

"Lin Yu," Su Xiaoxiao said, one day. "What are you going to do after graduation?"

Lin Yu thought for a moment. "I'm not sure. I want to find a job in my field, but I also want to travel."

Su Xiaoxiao nodded. "Me too. I want to be a teacher, but I also want to see the world."

Lin Yu smiled. "Maybe we can do both."

Su Xiaoxiao's eyes lit up. "Really?"

Lin Yu nodded. "Yeah. We can get jobs, save up money, and then travel together."

Su Xiaoxiao smiled. "That sounds amazing."

***

On graduation day, Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao wore their caps and gowns, and they walked across the stage together.

Their families were there, cheering them on.

After the ceremony, they took pictures with their friends and family.

"Lin Yu," Su Xiaoxiao said, taking his hand.

"What?"

"I'm so proud of you," Su Xiaoxiao said.

Lin Yu smiled. "I'm proud of you too."

***

That night, Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao had a quiet dinner together, just the two of them.

"This is the end of an era," Lin Yu said.

Su Xiaoxiao nodded. "But it's also the beginning of a new one."

Lin Yu smiled. "Yeah."

He took Su Xiaoxiao's hand, and he looked into her eyes.

"Su Xiaoxiao, I love you. And I want to spend the rest of my life with you."

Su Xiaoxiao's eyes filled with tears. "I love you too, Lin Yu."

They kissed, and Lin Yu knew that this was just the beginning.

Their adventure together was far from over, and he couldn't wait to see what the future held.

The end... for now.
